testCases.name: Single entity: gravity and positioning
testCases.description: Single entity falling under gravity with terminal velocity
headerLines: TEST CASE 1: Single Entity - Gravity & Positioning

entities.name: Ball
entities.description: Non-metallic, no wind (missing MagnetismForce and WindForce properties) - gravity only

testCases.name: Three entities: mass and radius variations
testCases.description: Three entities with different mass/radius combinations showing terminal velocity differences
headerLines: TEST CASE 2: Three Entities - Mass & Radius Variations
E1 & E2: same mass, different radius
E2 & E3: same radius, different mass

entities.name: Entity 1 (small radius)
entities.description: Mass=0.5kg, Radius=0.4m (low mass, moderate drag)

entities.name: Entity 2 (large radius)
entities.description: Mass=0.5kg, Radius=0.6m (same mass as E1, more drag = SLOWEST)

entities.name: Entity 3 (heavy)
entities.description: Mass=2.0kg, Radius=0.6m (heavier, same drag as E2 = FASTEST)

testCases.name: Two entities: one complete, one incomplete
testCases.description: Two entities: one with all properties (simulates), one missing Mass (no behavior)
headerLines: TEST CASE 3: Two Entities - Complete vs Incomplete
E1: has all required properties (will simulate)
E2: missing Mass (will NOT simulate)

entities.name: Complete entity
entities.description: Has all properties: Mass, Position, CurrentSpeed, Radius, Displacement

entities.name: Incomplete entity
entities.description: Missing Mass property - will have no behavior

testCases.name: Magnetism: metallic vs non-metallic entities
testCases.description: Two entities: one metallic (affected by magnetic field), one non-metallic (gravity only)
headerLines: TEST CASE 4: Magnetism - Metallic vs Non-Metallic
Metal ball: gravity + magnetic force (upward)
Plastic ball: gravity only

entities.name: Metal ball
entities.description: Metallic object (has MagnetismForce property) - affected by both gravity and magnetic field (upward)

entities.name: Plastic ball
entities.description: Non-metallic object (no MagnetismForce property) - affected by gravity and drag only

testCases.name: Wind effect: large radius vs small radius
testCases.description: Two entities with same mass: one with large radius (affected by wind), one with small radius (minimal wind effect)
headerLines: TEST CASE 5: Wind Effect - Large vs Small Radius
Large ball: gravity + wind (large cross-section)
Small ball: gravity + minimal wind (small cross-section)

entities.name: Large ball (wind-affected)
entities.description: Mass=1.0kg, Radius=1.0m - large cross-section, significantly affected by wind

entities.name: Small ball (minimal wind)
entities.description: Mass=1.0kg, Radius=0.5m - small cross-section, minimal wind effect

testCases.name: Combined forces: gravity only, gravity+magnetism, gravity+wind, gravity+magnetism+wind
testCases.description: Four entities with identical size/mass but different force combinations: gravity-only, gravity+magnetism, gravity+wind, gravity+magnetism+wind
headerLines: TEST CASE 6: Combined Forces - Force Composition
Entity 1: gravity only (downward)
Entity 2: gravity + magnetism (upward magnetic force)
Entity 3: gravity + wind (horizontal wind push)
Entity 4: gravity + magnetism + wind (all forces)

entities.name: Gravity only
entities.description: Non-metallic, no wind (missing MagnetismForce and WindForce properties) - gravity only

entities.name: Gravity + Magnetism
entities.description: Metallic (has MagnetismForce property), no wind effect - gravity and magnetic field (upward force counteracts gravity)

entities.name: Gravity + Wind
entities.description: Non-metallic (no MagnetismForce property), affected by wind - gravity and wind force (horizontal push)

entities.name: Gravity + Wind + Magnetism
entities.description: Metallic (has MagnetismForce and WindForce properties) - gravity+magnetism+wind (all forces active)

testCases.name: Single entity + Earth: N-body gravity
testCases.description: Single entity falling under N-body gravitational attraction from Earth
headerLines: TEST CASE 7: Single Entity + Earth - N-Body Gravity

entities.name: Earth
entities.description: Planet Earth - massive body at origin providing gravitational attraction

entities.name: Ball
entities.description: Non-metallic, no wind (missing MagnetismForce and WindForce properties) - N-body gravity only

testCases.name: Three entities + Earth: N-body mass and radius variations
testCases.description: Three entities with different mass/radius combinations under N-body gravitational attraction from Earth

E2 & E3: same radius, different mass
